title: Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sarajevo is a city in Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina with a population of 275,000. The capital and largest city of Bosnia and Herzegovina, a cultural crossroads where East meets West, known for its Ottoman-era Baščaršija and the 1984 Winter Olympics legacy.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
